shared_properties: Enemy sheet keeps a 120x180 px body scale per frame and top-side staging that faces the player lane.
Casting poses preserve left-to-right projectile launch direction for readable threat telegraphing.
differences: This sheet packs Idle, Casting, Hit, and Defeated states into one deterministic atlas with 26 total frames.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Enemy stage placement, upper-side framing, and academy robe trim grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy GDD
reference_images.purpose: Enemy state counts, top-side placement, and battle pacing grounding.

reference_images.label: Reflect Academy player concept
reference_images.purpose: Scale relationship between student duelists and costume detail density grounding.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use TextureAtlasLayout with 26 frames and store clip metadata in an EnemyCasterVisual component.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load character/rival_champion_state_sheet.png through AssetServer and create clip metadata during encounter setup.
runtime_notes: Spawn frame origin at x=1380 px and y=670 px.
Clip ranges are Idle 0-7, Casting 8-13, Hit 14-17, Defeated 18-25.
Keep casting hand flare inside the frame so projectile spawn offsets stay deterministic.

context.role: Primary enemy duelist art used for anticipation, cast release, damage reaction, and defeat states.
context.usage: Visible whenever the current academy opponent is active on the upper side of the duel hall.

deliverables.notes: 26-frame atlas arranged as 13 columns by 2 rows.
State clip map for Idle, Casting, Hit, and Defeated.

acceptance_criteria: Sheet size is exactly 1560x360 px with 26 used frames at 120x180 px each.
Idle uses 8 frames, Casting uses 6 frames, Hit uses 4 frames, and Defeated uses 8 frames with the clip ranges declared in specs.animation.state_clips.
Projectile release hand remains within the right 32 px of each casting frame for consistent spawn alignment.
